title: Avoid storing passwords in plaintext or with fast hashing algorithms
description: Improper storage of passwords poses a significant security risk to software applications. This vulnerability arises when passwords are stored in plaintext or with a fast hashing algorithm.
recommendation: Store passwords securely using strong hashing algorithms or encryption.
impact: Unauthorized access to user accounts, potential data breaches, and identity theft.

checks.message: Store passwords securely using strong hashing algorithms or encryption.
